scripts.build: yarn workspace invoice-processor-backend run build && yarn workspace invoice-processor-frontend run build
scripts.ocr:dev: PYTHON_BIN=${PYTHON_BIN:-python3}; if [ -x ./.venv-ml/bin/python ]; then PYTHON_BIN=./.venv-ml/bin/python; fi; "$PYTHON_BIN" -m uvicorn app.api:app --app-dir invoice-ocr --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8000
scripts.slm:dev: PYTHON_BIN=${PYTHON_BIN:-python3}; if [ -x ./.venv-ml/bin/python ]; then PYTHON_BIN=./.venv-ml/bin/python; fi; "$PYTHON_BIN" -m uvicorn app.api:app --app-dir invoice-slm --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8100
scripts.test: yarn workspace invoice-processor-backend run test && yarn workspace invoice-processor-frontend run test
scripts.coverage:check: yarn workspace invoice-processor-backend run coverage && yarn workspace invoice-processor-frontend run coverage
scripts.quality:check: yarn run knip && yarn run coverage:check
